---
title: "Projects"
---

## Project 1 — Baseline ML (Notebook → Modular → MLOps)
- **Goal:** (Identy most probably churn users)
- **Data:** (fuente / sintético / público)
- **Metric:** (AUC/F1/etc.)
- **Links:** repo, notebook, demo
- **Case study**: projects/bank_churn/index.qmd

## Project 2 — Recommendation System
- (placeholder)
